textPlain: This is awesome.  It also brought back some anxiety from >10 years ago in college that reminds me that computer graphics and my brain do not agree whatsoever.

This is cool! I love this kind of simulation GPU programming stuff. Reminds me of this awesome talk from Peter Whidden: https://youtu.be/Hju0H3NHxVI?si=V_UZugPSL9a8eHEMNot as technicial but similarly cool.
